query:
SELECT
                    event_id,
                    resource_uid as uid,
                    resource_kind as "kind!",
                    event_time,
                    event_type,
                    event_payload as "payload!"
                FROM resource_events
                WHERE ($1::bigint IS NULL OR event_id > $1)
                  AND ($2::bigint IS NULL OR event_id <= $2)
                ORDER BY event_id
